ab: kaiasaa mahedela ku ki ina avaevaehe.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: sa avaiya waledra subelebelenge, kadruwa ka makecelre kadruwa ka wadrangedrange, mangangehece ku saseveha.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: yakai nai ki ububula kwanekane ku mingpau, ku vai pasaelre ki kinaumasane nai pakaculu.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: la kitubulruwa ku ki ina, ani kadiheele subelebelenge?
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: laiya ikai ku ina, tali aikela ku sedreke.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: sa amaungu kadruwa ku emeeme subelebelenge, ngyabuale ku tahiyau.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: ikai kaelrelrea, la kitubiya ku ki tahiyau.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: anatuma lakai kela ku sedreke, apya kivaevangeanana ku.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
